name: Chocolate Nut Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the shortening and chocolate over low heat, stirring occasionally until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the liquid sweetener, vanilla, and beaten eggs until well combined.
3. Add the sifted flour, baking soda, and chopped nuts; mix until just incorporated.
4. Pour batter into a greased 8-inch cake pan (or spray with Pam).
5. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes or until set when tested.
6. Cool completely before cutting into squares.
Exchange: 2 brownies = 1/2 bread and 1 1/2 fat.
